description: OT — Crown-jewel / safety-PLC heatmap (Claroty xDome SRA pattern). Surfaces SIL-3 blast-furnace zone assets, SRA sessions on crown jewels, and risk concentration per zone×criticality and zone×SIL-level. References IEC 61511 SIL-3 classification; MITRE ATT&CK for ICS T0822/T0866.

graphs.title: SIL-3 assets (total)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_id": "$asset_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter sil_level == "SIL-3" or sil_level == "SIL3"
| group n = dcount(asset_id)

graphs.title: SIL-3 assets with open vulns
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"vuln_count": $vuln_count{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"asset_id": "$asset_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter sil_level == "SIL-3" or sil_level == "SIL3"
| filter vuln_count > 0
| group n = dcount(asset_id)

graphs.title: SRA sessions to crown jewels (24h)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sra_session_id": "$sra_session_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter criticality == "CROWN_JEWEL" or criticality == "CRITICAL"
| group n = dcount(sra_session_id)

graphs.title: Assets with risk score >= 80
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"risk_score": $risk_score{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"asset_id": "$asset_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter risk_score >= 80
| group n = dcount(asset_id)

graphs.title: Heatmap — assets per zone × criticality
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_id": "$asset_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group asset_n = dcount(asset_id) by zone, criticality
| filter zone = *
| filter criticality = *
| sort - asset_n

graphs.title: Heatmap — assets per zone × SIL level
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_id": "$asset_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group asset_n = dcount(asset_id) by zone, sil_level
| filter zone = *
| filter sil_level = *
| sort - asset_n

graphs.title: Top 20 crown jewels by risk score
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"risk_score": $risk_score{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"vuln_count": $vuln_count{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"business_impact": "$business_impact{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter criticality == "CROWN_JEWEL" or criticality == "CRITICAL"
| group max_risk = max(risk_score), max_vulns = max(vuln_count) by asset_name, zone, sil_level, criticality, business_impact
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - max_risk, - max_vulns
| limit 20

graphs.title: SIL-3 BLAST_FURNACE zone — asset inventory
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"vendor": "$vendor{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"risk_score": $risk_score{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"vuln_count": $vuln_count{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| filter zone == "BLAST_FURNACE"
| filter sil_level == "SIL-3" or sil_level == "SIL3"
| group risk = max(risk_score), vulns = max(vuln_count) by asset_name, zone, sil_level, vendor
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - risk, - vulns

graphs.title: Vuln severity per crown-jewel asset
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"vuln_severity": "$vuln_severity{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter criticality == "CROWN_JEWEL" or criticality == "CRITICAL"
| group
    crit_v = count( vuln_severity == "CRITICAL" ),
    high_v = count( vuln_severity == "HIGH" ),
    med_v  = count( vuln_severity == "MEDIUM" ),
    low_v  = count( vuln_severity == "LOW" )
  by asset_name
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - crit_v, - high_v
| limit 30

graphs.title: SRA sessions per user → crown jewels
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"sra_user": "$sra_user{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sra_session_id": "$sra_session_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sra_duration_sec": $sra_duration_sec{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| filter criticality == "CROWN_JEWEL" or criticality == "CRITICAL"
| group sessions = dcount(sra_session_id), assets = dcount(asset_name), total_sec = sum(sra_duration_sec) by sra_user
| filter sra_user = *
| sort - sessions, - total_sec
| limit 20

graphs.title: Long SRA sessions on SIL-3 assets (> 1h)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"sra_user": "$sra_user{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sra_session_id": "$sra_session_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sra_duration_sec": $sra_duration_sec{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| filter sil_level == "SIL-3" or sil_level == "SIL3"
| filter sra_duration_sec > 3600
| group max_sec = max(sra_duration_sec) by sra_session_id, sra_user, asset_name, zone
| filter sra_session_id = *
| sort - max_sec
| limit 30

graphs.title: SRA session activity by hour (count + total duration)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"sra_session_id": "$sra_session_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sra_duration_sec": $sra_duration_sec{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter criticality == "CROWN_JEWEL" or criticality == "CRITICAL"
| group sessions = dcount(sra_session_id), total_sec = sum(sra_duration_sec) by hour = timebucket('1 hour')
| sort hour

graphs.title: Risk-score distribution by zone
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"risk_score": $risk_score{regex=[0-9]+}$' from message
| parse '"asset_id": "$asset_id{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group
    risk_critical = dcount( risk_score >= 90 ? asset_id : null ),
    risk_high     = dcount( risk_score >= 70 and risk_score < 90 ? asset_id : null ),
    risk_medium   = dcount( risk_score >= 40 and risk_score < 70 ? asset_id : null ),
    risk_low      = dcount( risk_score < 40 ? asset_id : null )
  by zone
| filter zone = *
| sort - risk_critical, - risk_high

graphs.title: Crown-jewel assets without telemetry in 24h
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'claroty' )
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"sil_level": "$sil_level{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"criticality": "$criticality{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"last_seen": "$last_seen{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter criticality == "CROWN_JEWEL" or criticality == "CRITICAL"
| group events = count(), last = max(timestamp) by asset_name, zone, sil_level, last_seen
| filter events = 0
| sort asset_name
| limit 30
